paper_title: OlympiadBench: A Challenging Benchmark for Promoting AGI with Olympiad-Level Bilingual Multimodal Scientific Problems
evaluation_method: Automated scoring pipeline with five answer types: Numeric (floating-point comparison with tolerance), Expressions (SymPy verification), Equations (term rearrangement + division check), Intervals and Tuples (element-by-element). Mathematical equivalence checking, not string matching.
